ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "recording_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each recording */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was captured */,
  "accel_x" REAL /* Acceleration data in the x-axis */,
  "accel_y" REAL /* Acceleration data in the y-axis */,
  "accel_z" REAL /* Acceleration data in the z-axis */,
  "gyro_x" REAL /* Gyroscope data in the x-axis */,
  "gyro_y" REAL /* Gyroscope data in the y-axis */,
  "gyro_z" REAL /* Gyroscope data in the z-axis */,
  "mag_x" REAL /* Magnetometer data in the x-axis */,
  "mag_y" REAL /* Magnetometer data in the y-axis */,
  "mag_z" REAL /* Magnetometer data in the z-axis */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor used (e.g., Thingy) */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity being performed */,
  "activity_code" INTEGER /* Code corresponding to the activity type */,
  "subject_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the subject wearing the device */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes regarding the recording */,
  "heart_rate" INTEGER /* Heart rate data from the wearable device */,
  "battery_level" REAL /* Battery level of the device at the time of data collection */,
  "location" TEXT /* GPS coordinates or location data if available */,
  "environmental_temperature" REAL /* Ambient temperature data from the wearable device */,
  "environmental_humidity" REAL /* Ambient humidity data from the wearable device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recording_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_activity_code FOREIGN KEY ("activity_code") REFERENCES activities ("activity_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_sensor_type FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_type") REFERENCES sensor_types ("sensor_type_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "subjects" (
  "subject_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each subject */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the subject */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the subject */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the subject */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the subject */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the subject in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the subject in kilograms */,
  "medical_conditions" TEXT /* Any known medical conditions of the subject */,
  "device_model" TEXT /* Model of the wearable device used by the subject */,
  "device_serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the wearable device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activities" (
  "activity_code" INTEGER /* Unique code for the activity */,
  "activity_name" TEXT /* Name of the activity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "calories_burned" REAL /* Average calories burned during the activity */,
  "recommended_frequency" TEXT /* Recommended frequency for performing the activity */,
  "safety_precautions" TEXT /* Safety precautions to be taken during the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_types" (
  "sensor_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor type */,
  "sensor_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor type (e.g., Thingy) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor type */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the sensor type */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor type */,
  "supported_features" TEXT /* Features supported by the sensor type (e.g., heart rate, GPS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_metadata" (
  "sensor_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor type */,
  "data_rate" REAL /* Data rate at which the sensor transmits data */,
  "battery_life" REAL /* Battery life of the sensor in hours */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Current firmware version of the sensor */,
  "sensor_version" TEXT /* Version of the sensor hardware */,
  "sensor_firmware_release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the current firmware version */,
  "max_data_rate" REAL /* Maximum data rate supported by the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recordings" (
  "recording_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each recording session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the recording session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the recording session */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the recording session in seconds */,
  "subject_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the subject */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes regarding the recording session */,
  "location" TEXT /* GPS coordinates or location data for the recording session */,
  "environmental_conditions" TEXT /* Environmental conditions during the recording session (e.g., weather, temperature) */,
  "device_battery_level" REAL /* Battery level of the device at the start of the recording session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recording_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recordings_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "activity_code" INTEGER /* Code representing the activity detected */,
  "recording_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the recording session */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the detected activity */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the activity detection */,
  "calories_burned" REAL /* Calories burned during the activity */,
  "distance_covered" REAL /* Distance covered during the activity */,
  "steps_count" INTEGER /* Number of steps taken during the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_activity_code FOREIGN KEY ("activity_code") REFERENCES activities ("activity_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_recording_id FOREIGN KEY ("recording_id") REFERENCES recordings ("recording_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., user, healthcare provider) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "access_level" INTEGER /* Numerical value representing the access level of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role of the user (e.g., user, healthcare provider) */,
  "subject_id" TEXT /* Reference to the subject associated with the user account */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
